name: Dotdigital
description: Send Segment events and user profile data to Dotdigital.

api_host.description: The region your account is in
api_host.label: Region

actions.name: Add or Update Contact
actions.defaultTrigger: type = "track" and event = "Add or Update Contact"

fields.label: Contact Identifier type
fields.description: Select the field to identify contacts.

channelIdentifier.title: Contact Identifier type
channelIdentifier.description: Select the field to identify contacts.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: The Contact's email address.

fields.label: Mobile Number
fields.description: The Contact's mobile number.

fields.label: Email Type
fields.description: The type of email the contact prefers to receive.

emailType.title: Email Type
emailType.description: The type of email the contact prefers to receive.

fields.label: Opt-in Type
fields.description: The type of opt-in used for this contact. [Learn more](https://support.dotdigital.com/en/articles/8198810-email-opt-in-types)

optInType.title: Opt-in Type
optInType.description: The type of opt-in used for this contact. [Learn more](https://support.dotdigital.com/en/articles/8198810-email-opt-in-types)

fields.label: Update Email Subscription Status
fields.description: Choose whether to update the email subscription status.

updateEmailSubscription.title: Update Email Subscription Status
updateEmailSubscription.description: Choose whether to update the email subscription status.

fields.label: Email Subscription Status
fields.description: The subscription status for the email channel.

emailSubscriptionStatus.title: Email Subscription Status
emailSubscriptionStatus.description: The subscription status for the email channel.

fields.label: Resubscribe if Previously Unsubscribed
fields.description: When Yes, the action will send a "subscribed" status in the API call for email.

emailResubscribe.title: Resubscribe if Previously Unsubscribed
emailResubscribe.description: When Yes, the action will send a "subscribed" status in the API call for email.

fields.label: Resubscribe Without Challenge Email
fields.description: If Yes, no resubscription confirmation email will be sent.

resubscribeWithoutChallengeEmail.title: Resubscribe Without Challenge Email
resubscribeWithoutChallengeEmail.description: If Yes, no resubscription confirmation email will be sent.

fields.label: Preferred Language
fields.description: Choose the language that you would like the resubscribe request email to be sent in.

preferredLocale.title: Preferred Language
preferredLocale.description: Choose the language that you would like the resubscribe request email to be sent in.

fields.label: Redirect URL
fields.description: The URL you would like to redirect challenged contacts to after they have completed their resubscription.

redirectUrlAfterChallenge.title: Redirect URL
redirectUrlAfterChallenge.description: The URL you would like to redirect challenged contacts to after they have completed their resubscription.

fields.label: Update SMS Subscription Status
fields.description: Choose whether to update the SMS subscription status.

updateSmsSubscription.title: Update SMS Subscription Status
updateSmsSubscription.description: Choose whether to update the SMS subscription status.

fields.label: SMS Subscription Status
fields.description: The subscription status for the SMS channel.

smsSubscriptionStatus.title: SMS Subscription Status
smsSubscriptionStatus.description: The subscription status for the SMS channel.

fields.label: List
fields.description: The list to add the contact to.

listId.title: List
listId.description: The list to add the contact to.

fields.label: Data Fields
fields.description: An object containing key/value pairs for data fields assigned to this Contact. Custom Data Fields must already be defined in Dotdigital.

dataFields.title: Data Fields
dataFields.description: An object containing key/value pairs for data fields assigned to this Contact. Custom Data Fields must already be defined in Dotdigital.

actions.name: Enrol Contact to Program
actions.defaultTrigger: type = "track" and event = "Enrol Contact to Program"

fields.label: Contact Identifier type
fields.description: Select the field to identify contacts.

channelIdentifier.title: Contact Identifier type
channelIdentifier.description: Select the field to identify contacts.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: The Contact's email address.

fields.label: Mobile Number
fields.description: The Contact's mobile number.

fields.label: Program
fields.description: List of active programs

actions.name: Remove Contact from List
actions.description: Removes a Contact from a List.
actions.defaultTrigger: type = "track" and event = "Remove Contact from List"

fields.label: Contact Identifier type
fields.description: Select the field to identify contacts.

channelIdentifier.title: Contact Identifier type
channelIdentifier.description: Select the field to identify contacts.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: The Contact's email address.

fields.label: Mobile Number
fields.description: The Contact's mobile number.

fields.label: List
fields.description: The List to remove the Contact from.

listId.title: List
listId.description: The List to remove the Contact from.

actions.name: Send Email Campaign
actions.description: Sends a marketing email to a contact.

fields.label: Email
fields.description: A single email address to send the campaign to. If the contact does not exist in your Dotdigital account, the campaign won't be sent.

email.title: Email
email.description: A single email address to send the campaign to. If the contact does not exist in your Dotdigital account, the campaign won't be sent.

fields.label: Campaign
fields.description: The campaign to email to a contact.

campaignId.title: Campaign
campaignId.description: The campaign to email to a contact.

fields.label: Send Date
fields.description: The campaign will be sent immediately if the send date is left blank.

sendDate.title: Send Date
sendDate.description: The campaign will be sent immediately if the send date is left blank.

fields.label: Send Time Optimised
fields.description: Send the campaign at the most appropriate time based upon their previous opens.

sendTimeOptimised.title: Send Time Optimised
sendTimeOptimised.description: Send the campaign at the most appropriate time based upon their previous opens.

actions.name: Send SMS
actions.description: Sends a marketing SMS to a contact.

fields.label: To
fields.description: The mobile number of the contact in E.164 format (e.g. 14155552671).

to.title: To
to.description: The mobile number of the contact in E.164 format (e.g. 14155552671).

fields.label: Message
fields.description: The message to send in the SMS.

message.title: Message
message.description: The message to send in the SMS.

fields.label: From Address
fields.description: Use either your default transactional email from address, or another custom from address you have added to your account. If you set a from address that is not listed in your available from addresses, Dotdigital will replace it with your default from address. You may set a from name as well as an email address, for example "My Company <`Dotmailer123@r1.dotdigital-email.com`>". [Read more about using transactional email](https://support.dotdigital.com/en/articles/8199068-use-transactional-email).

fromAddress.title: From Address
fromAddress.description: Use either your default transactional email from address, or another custom from address you have added to your account. If you set a from address that is not listed in your available from addresses, Dotdigital will replace it with your default from address. You may set a from name as well as an email address, for example "My Company <`Dotmailer123@r1.dotdigital-email.com`>". [Read more about using transactional email](https://support.dotdigital.com/en/articles/8199068-use-transactional-email).

fields.label: To Address
fields.description: The email address(es) to send to.

toAddresses.title: To Address
toAddresses.description: The email address(es) to send to.

fields.label: Subject
fields.description: The subject line for your email.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject line for your email.

fields.label: HTML Content
fields.description: The HTML content for your email.

htmlContent.title: HTML Content
htmlContent.description: The HTML content for your email.

fields.label: Plain Text Content
fields.description: The plain text content for your email.

plainTextContent.title: Plain Text Content
plainTextContent.description: The plain text content for your email.

fields.label: CC Addresses
fields.description: The CC email address(es) to send to. Separate email addresses with a comma. Maximum: 100.

ccAddresses.title: CC Addresses
ccAddresses.description: The CC email address(es) to send to. Separate email addresses with a comma. Maximum: 100.

fields.label: BCC Addresses
fields.description: The BCC email address(es) to send to. Separate email addresses with a comma. Maximum: 100.

bccAddresses.title: BCC Addresses
bccAddresses.description: The BCC email address(es) to send to. Separate email addresses with a comma. Maximum: 100.

fields.label: To
fields.description: Only valid mobile numbers with an international dialling prefix will be accepted (e.g. 447777123123).

to.title: To
to.description: Only valid mobile numbers with an international dialling prefix will be accepted (e.g. 447777123123).

fields.label: From
fields.description: Enter a custom From name, or leave blank to use a random number. From name format varies by region. [Learn more](https://support.dotdigital.com/en/articles/8199187-sender-ids-and-originators)

from.title: From
from.description: Enter a custom From name, or leave blank to use a random number. From name format varies by region. [Learn more](https://support.dotdigital.com/en/articles/8199187-sender-ids-and-originators)

fields.label: Message
fields.description: The content of the SMS, up to 160 non-encoded characters per message.

message.title: Message
message.description: The content of the SMS, up to 160 non-encoded characters per message.

fields.label: Link Shortening
fields.description: [Link shortening](https://developer.dotdigital.com/v2/reference/additional-options#link-shortening) will automatically shorten your links to save character count and track who clicked on them for better reporting. Defaults to No.

link_shortening.title: Link Shortening
link_shortening.description: [Link shortening](https://developer.dotdigital.com/v2/reference/additional-options#link-shortening) will automatically shorten your links to save character count and track who clicked on them for better reporting. Defaults to No.

fields.label: Allow Unicode Characters
fields.description: If Yes, Unicode characters will be allowed in the message body. If No, any messages containing Unicode will not be sent. Please [read why Unicode](https://developer.dotdigital.com/reference/channel-sms#section-why-is-unicode-important-with-sms) is important before switching this on. Defaults to No.

allow_unicode.title: Allow Unicode Characters
allow_unicode.description: If Yes, Unicode characters will be allowed in the message body. If No, any messages containing Unicode will not be sent. Please [read why Unicode](https://developer.dotdigital.com/reference/channel-sms#section-why-is-unicode-important-with-sms) is important before switching this on. Defaults to No.
